requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 as Timor-Leste Project Baseline
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619作为东帝汶项目基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619作為東帝汶項目基準

summary.en: Timor-Leste has no publicly confirmed dedicated mandatory BESS product certification regime equivalent to more mature national frameworks. Timor-Leste projects increasingly reference IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 in design review where technical teams rely on international documents. The practical route is an ANE and Ministry-linked project-compliance pathway for regulated grid-connected BESS. Exporters should confirm the latest scope with ANE/EDTL before shipment, then submit IEC-aligned module-level safety evidence under project terms.
summary.zh: 东帝汶尚无公开确认的与成熟国家框架等同的专用BESS产品强制认证体系。当前项目层面越来越多地在设计评审中引用IEC 62619和IEC 62933。对项目而言，ANE与能源主管机构链接的路线是主要合规路径。出口商应在出货前与ANE/EDTL确认最新适用范围，并按项目条件提交IEC对齐的模组级安全证据。
summary.zht: 東帝汶尚無公開確認的與成熟國家框架等同的專用BESS產品強制認證體系。當前項目層面越來越多地在設計審核中引用IEC 62619和IEC 62933。對項目而言，ANE與能源主管機構連結的路徑是主要合規路徑。出口商應在出貨前與ANE/EDTL確認最新適用範圍，並按項目條件提交IEC對齊的模組級安全證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation
Timor-Leste ANE project review expectation for international-standard-referenced technical submissions

summary.en: China primarily references GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB 38031 for lithium battery and storage safety context. These are useful for engineering planning but should be used as supporting material only when a Timor-Leste project explicitly references IEC equivalence.
summary.zh: 中国主要以GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB 38031作为锂电池与储能安全背景。其可用于工程规划，但仅能作为补充材料，除非东帝汶项目明确要求IEC等效。
summary.zht: 中國主要以GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB 38031作為鋰電池與儲能安全背景。其可用于工程規劃，但僅能作為補充材料，除非東帝汶項目明確要求IEC等效。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池
GB 38031-2020 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求

gap.en: Gap: Chinese standards are not automatic substitutes for Timor-Leste project requirements where ANE/EDTL reviews are invoked. The practical gap is confirming required module-level evidence scope, test report currency, and local project documentation, especially for battery thermal stability under tropical heat and humidity.
gap.zh: 差距：中国标准不能在ANE/EDTL项目评估路径被触发时直接替代东帝汶项目要求。实际差距在于确认模组级证据范围、报告时效性及本地项目文件，特别是锂电池在热带高温潮湿环境下的热稳定性。
gap.zht: 差距：中國標準不能在ANE/EDTL項目審核路徑被觸發時直接替代東帝汶項目要求。實際差距在於確認模組級證據範圍、報告時效性及本地項目文件，特別是鋰電池在熱帶高溫潮濕環境下的熱穩定性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Timor-Leste project documents call for IEC 62619 module evidence and ANE/EDTL review
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory within Chinese domestic product conformity and project procurement for similar systems

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62619-aligned module evidence is the practical baseline for Timor-Leste BESS project review where applicable. China GB standards are supporting references only, and project acceptance in a developing Timor-Leste market remains dependent on ANE/EDTL or project-owner scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于可适用情形，IEC 62619对齐的模组级证据是东帝汶BESS项目审查的实际基准。中国GB标准仅为支持性参考，东帝汶作为发展中市场的项目验收仍取决于ANE/EDTL或项目业主范围要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於可適用情形，IEC 62619對齊的模組級證據是東帝汶BESS項目審核的實際基準。中國GB標準僅為支持性參考，東帝汶作為發展中市場的項目驗收仍取決於ANE/EDTL或項目業主範圍。
